summary: Implemented requirements gap-closure: plain-language accessible GUI with tooltips, elevated backend relaunch for one-click updates, configurable apply timeout, and in-repo agent governance scaffold.
decisions: Winget remains the sole apply path; WUA listing deferred as out of scope
Governance scaffolded in-repo without restoring private agentmesh package
Default apply subprocess timeout raised to 1800s via VERIPATCH_APPLY_TIMEOUT
next_steps: Tag v1.3.0 after milestone exit criteria verified in CI
Promote staging to main via PR with release consensus
